Nexus Pipeline Conditions for 4/22/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day April 22, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to NEXUS's operational capacity.  The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding NEXUS's operational capacity:












Restricted Locations Scheduled and Sealed   Priority % Restricted Notes
TABS IT 4B 4A 3B 3A 2 1
Hanoverton   N/A 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 36% Due to Nexus Posted Outage
Meter N2001 Receipts   N/A 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% Due to Nexus Posted Outage
All Vector Meters Downstream of Milford Junction N4MJ1   N/A 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% Due to DTE Posted Outage
Belle River   N/A 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 53% Due to DTE Posted Outage
Ypsilanti   N/A 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 100% 51% Due to DTE Posted Outage












OFO / Imbalance Notice










OFO ---









Customer Specific OFO No DP - effective 4/17/26.  4% / 500 Dth Tolerance


Imbalances Warnings ---





















Systemwide Notes:










Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.












Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.


BackPrint
